# Yash Vekaria

> Yash Vekaria is a design-minded front-end software engineer focused on building beautiful interfaces and experiences with React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

## About

- Name: Yash Vekaria
- Role: Front-end Software Engineer
- Employer: Avesta Technologies (http://www.avestatechnologies.com/)
- Skills: Front-end Development, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, React Native, Next.js, HTML, CSS, Sass, UI/UX Design, Web Performance, Accessibility
- Contact: yashvekaria@gmail.com
- Website: https://yash.vekaria.in
